backend.changelog: Manifest schema v2 — sha256 field added per artifact. No functional changes to runtime; parser groundwork for Phase 2 auto-apply.

cadBridge.changelog: Setup.bat now strips Internet-zone markers from extracted files before launching Setup.ps1 — closes the 'Unknown publisher' UAC and 'Run scripts from Internet?' PowerShell prompts customers would see after a browser-download. First release through the automated cadbridge-v* workflow.
